admission_no_go_posture: Current instruction does not itself admit a live request
No executor may proceed unless the exact admission phrase is present as current instruction

preflight_behavior_rules: Include the current review bundle artifact only
Keep the result browser-local or packet-local only
Preserve the current stop posture and blocked downstream boundaries
Reject export if the review bundle is stale or internally inconsistent
Stop the current branch after export unless later separate admission is provided
not_admitted: Browser controls that submit a request
Any runtime route call or network request
Any record creation or replay proof
